node.statement: N1.6 (CONCLUSION: A is an O(eta)-eps-JB order-unit algebra). By N1.3, B_sa=(B_sa,∘⋆,I_B,B_+) is an O(eta)-eps-JB order-unit algebra: it satisfies the def-eps-jb-algebra axioms JB1-JB4 with eps<=C eta (C universal dimension-free) and exact order/unit/norm. By N1.5, j is an EXACT unital order-isometric Jordan isomorphism of (A,•) onto the ∘⋆-closed subset j(A) subseteq B_sa. An exact unital order-isometry transports the def-eps-jb-algebra structure verbatim: (i) order/unit/norm: A's order, unit 1_A, and order-unit norm are inherited exactly from B(H)_sa (def-near-fixed-algebra), and j is order-isometric (||j(a)||=||a||, j preserves the cone, j(1_A)=I_B), so A is a finite-dim real order-unit space and ||a||=||j(a)|| identifies the order-unit norms exactly; (ii) the exact identities (commutativity a•b=b•a, unit law 1_A•a=a) transport since j(a•b)=j(a)∘⋆j(b) and ∘⋆ has them exactly on B_sa with j injective; (iii) each O(eta) axiom transports with the SAME eps: e.g. JB1 ||a•b||=||j(a•b)||=||j(a)∘⋆j(b)||<=(1+eps)||j(a)|| ||j(b)||=(1+eps)||a|| ||b||; JB2 ||a•a||=||j(a)∘⋆j(a)||>=(1-eps)||j(a)||^2=(1-eps)||a||^2; JB3 a•a>=-eps||a||^2 1_A follows from j(a•a)=j(a)∘⋆j(a)>=-eps||j(a)||^2 I_B and j being an order embedding with j(1_A)=I_B (apply j^{-1} on j(A), order-preserving); JB4 ||((a•a)•b)•a-(a•a)•(b•a)||=||j(...)-j(...)||=||((j(a)∘⋆j(a))∘⋆j(b))∘⋆j(a)-(j(a)∘⋆j(a))∘⋆(j(b)∘⋆j(a))||<=eps||j(a)||^3 ||j(b)||=eps||a||^3 ||b|| (using j(a•b)=j(a)∘⋆j(b) repeatedly and ||j(.)||=||.||). All four use the SAME eps<=C eta as B_sa since j is an isometry and an exact Jordan iso onto j(A). Therefore A=(A,•,1,A_+) is an O(eta)-eps-JB order-unit algebra. This is the contract.
